feature_name: v1.14.0 "Quick Wins" -- random ("feeling lucky") sort + re-roll, mobile logo = desktop brand mark, per-folder hide-from-sidebar, default landing view (Settings)
base: main. NOTE: the working tree is currently on branch feat/icon-sets; the coordinator owns ALL git and will create feature/v1.14-quickwins off main before implementation. Prior shipped record: docs/exec-plans/completed/2026-07-06-v1.13-polish.md (if present) / the icon-set + subscriptions polish rounds.
git_ownership_note: Coordinator owns ALL git. SDEs must NOT commit/stage/push. SDE reports files-changed + test output; coordinator commits per task.
node_toolchain_note: Node 22 is the toolchain standard. A Node 22 toolchain is at /tmp/claude-1000/-home-coder-projects-filetube/139c0e56-b545-4e8e-ba05-f892f6dd6d0d/scratchpad/node-v22.23.1-linux-x64/bin -- build-verify MUST run tests on Node 22 (not just fnm's default). fnm PATH export still needed for the default: export PATH="/home/coder/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v24.14.0/installation/bin:$PATH".
process_plan: RIGHT-SIZED. Four small, low-risk, ADDITIVE prefs. Light Discovery (PM: turn the 4 into concrete ACs; all four are well-understood, additive UI/pref changes -- no adversarial gate). Then SDE implementation -> build-verify on Node 22 -> a SINGLE quality-assurance review -> Dean's on-device pass (the arbiter for the visual bits: item 1 shuffle UX, item 2 mobile logo). No heavy second-reviewer gate. Ship cadence: merge -> tag v1.14.0 -> Docker publish (CI is the image arbiter) -> Dean's on-device pass.
hard_constraints: ADDITIVE / NO REGRESSIONS. Existing sort options (newest/oldest/title/size), the sidebar render, the home/recent view, the 'Hide from home' toggle, and the v1.9.0 mobile header layout (logo top-left, search below) all stay behaviorally identical for users who don't touch the new options.

follow docs/CONTRIBUTING.md: vanilla DOM (no framework/bundler), CommonJS server, 2-space/semicolons/single-quotes; prefer textContent over innerHTML for NEW dynamic strings (the existing sidebar render uses escapeHtml()+innerHTML -- keep any new dynamic labels XSS-safe); node:test for new/regression tests; lint 0; NO new dependencies.
Preserve the era-theme system (CSS custom properties / --vars). Any new CSS must use existing tokens; no hardcoded colors that break themes.

Item 3 whitelist gotcha: POST /api/config sanitizes folderSettings to {name, hidden} only (server.js ~1532-1535, plus conditional `order`). The new hiddenFromSidebar flag MUST be added to that whitelist or it is silently dropped on save. Backfill undefined -> false.

Item 4 allowlist gotcha: POST /api/settings rejects unknown keys with 400 (KNOWN_KEYS allowlist, server.js ~1643). A new defaultView pref must be added end-to-end (DEFAULT_SETTINGS, KNOWN_KEYS, a validator, settingsResponse) OR live in localStorage; brief says persist like db.json prefs -> db.settings.defaultView recommended.

Deep links must keep working: item 4's default view applies ONLY on a bare home load (no ?search=/?folder=/?root= query param); an explicit URL always wins. A stored default folder that no longer exists must fall back to Most Recent, never error.

product_forks_for_dean.item_1_reroll_affordance: RECOMMEND: a small dedicated 'shuffle again' / re-roll BUTTON (icon) beside the sort dropdown, shown only when sort='random', that re-randomizes the current items WITHOUT changing the selected sort. Cleaner than forcing a re-select of the dropdown. The 'random' PREFERENCE persists like other sorts (localStorage filetube_sort); the specific shuffle order is inherently ephemeral -- re-rolls on button press and re-randomizes on each fresh page load. PM to confirm; Dean is on-device arbiter for the exact affordance.
product_forks_for_dean.item_4_folder_identity: RECOMMEND: store the default view as the folder PATH/KEY -- the SAME string already used as the folderSettings key, item.rootFolder, and the /?root=<path> param (the existing folder identity throughout the app). Not a new synthetic id. Value empty/'recent'/null => Most Recent (the default). PM to confirm the sentinel value for 'Most Recent'.
product_forks_for_dean.item_2_desktop_icon_clarification: MINOR CLARIFICATION (Dean did not expect a fork here, but the code diverges so PM must confirm the target asset in one line): desktop '.logo' currently renders a TEXT wordmark 'FileTube' (no standalone icon image); the mobile '.mobile-logo' ALREADY uses (the only brand asset in public/). So 'use the desktop FileTube icon on mobile' is ambiguous. RECOMMEND unify by rendering the SAME brand mark on mobile as desktop -- simplest is to show the desktop wordmark on mobile top-left (drop the divergent favicon img), OR point .mobile-logo at whatever specific desktop icon asset Dean intends if one exists beyond favicon.svg. PM confirms the exact asset with Dean; keep the v1.9.0 mobile header layout intact.

1.title: Random ("feeling lucky") sort + re-roll
1.current_behavior_confirmed: Sort is CLIENT-side: public/js/main.js renderSorted() (main.js:104-116) switches over currentSort; server always returns newest-first (server.js:1784) and the client re-sorts. Preference persists via localStorage['filetube_sort'] (main.js:17 read, :207 write). Dropdown markup: public/index.html:104-111 (newest/oldest/title-asc/title-desc/size-desc/size-asc).
1.fix: Add a new sort option for a fully random order (Fisher-Yates shuffle of [...currentItems]) as a new <option> + a new case in renderSorted(); persist the 'random' choice via localStorage like the others. Add a re-roll ('shuffle again') affordance (recommend a small button, shown when sort=random) that re-randomizes without changing the sort. Re-rolls on button press; re-randomizes on fresh load.
files: public/css/style.css (only if a shuffle button needs styling)

2.title: Mobile logo = desktop brand mark
2.current_behavior_confirmed: public/index.html header-left has BOTH: .logo (index.html:54, a TEXT wordmark FileTube, CSS style.css:284-301) shown on desktop and hidden on mobile (CSS :1709-1711); and .mobile-logo (index.html:55-57, 28x28) hidden by default (CSS :1593) and shown on mobile (CSS :1713-1722). Only brand asset in public/ is favicon.svg.
2.fix: Unify the mobile top-left brand mark to match desktop (see item_2_desktop_icon_clarification fork -- PM confirms the exact asset). Touches the shared header markup (public/*.html header) + style.css .logo/.mobile-logo media queries. KEEP the v1.9.0 mobile header layout (logo top-left, search below) intact.
files: public/index.html (+ other public/*.html sharing the header: setup.html, watch.html if applicable)

3.title: Per-folder Hide from LEFT SIDEBAR (distinct from Hide from home)
3.current_behavior_confirmed: 'Hide from home' = folderSettings[path].hidden: Setup toggle at setup.html:267 (.folder-hidden-check -> s.hidden), applied SERVER-side to the recent/home view only (server.js:1748-1756); the folder STAYS in the sidebar. Sidebar render is CLIENT-side renderSidebarFolders (main.js:84-101), which shows every configured folder. POST /api/config sanitizes folderSettings to {name, hidden}(+order) ONLY (server.js:1532-1535).
3.fix: Add a new per-folder flag db.folderSettings[path].hiddenFromSidebar. Add a Setup toggle beside the existing 'Hide from home' toggle. renderSidebarFolders respects it (omit the folder from the sidebar list) -- the folder stays fully browsable via direct /?root=<path> URL and still obeys its own 'Hide from home' independently. Persist via updateDatabase. CRITICAL: add hiddenFromSidebar to the POST /api/config folderSettings whitelist (server.js ~1532) or it is dropped. Backfill undefined -> false.
3.arbiter: unit/integration test for the whitelist round-trip + Dean on-device

4.title: Default landing view (Settings dropdown)
4.current_behavior_confirmed: Home load public/js/main.js loadLibrary() (main.js:33-81) reads ?search=/?folder=/?root= from the URL; with none it renders Most Recent (server /api/videos default). db.settings (DEFAULT_SETTINGS server.js:40-45) is the persisted-prefs home, exposed via GET/POST /api/settings; POST rejects unknown keys with 400 via KNOWN_KEYS allowlist (server.js:1643). Setup page has the settings form for automation/cache prefs.
4.fix: Add a Setup dropdown to choose the default view on page open: 'Most Recent' (default) or any mapped folder (e.g. Music). Persist as db.settings.defaultView (folder PATH/KEY per the fork; empty/sentinel => Most Recent). On a BARE home load (no query param), apply the default view (equivalent to /?root=<path>). Deep links (explicit ?root/?search/?folder) always win. A stored folder that no longer exists falls back to Most Recent. Add defaultView end-to-end: DEFAULT_SETTINGS + KNOWN_KEYS + a validator + settingsResponse.
4.arbiter: unit/integration test for the pref round-trip + Dean on-device

cross_cutting: Items interact LIGHTLY: item 4 (default view) + the sidebar/home render (items 3 & the existing home filter) -- the default view renders a folder's ?root view, which is NOT subject to the home 'hidden' filter, and a folder can be hiddenFromSidebar yet still be the chosen default (reachable via default + direct URL). Item 1 (random sort) + the sort pref are self-contained on the home page. Keep the default-view + sidebar changes cohesive. No new deps; no regressions to existing sort/sidebar/home behavior.

history.note: New feature round v1.14.0 'Quick Wins' initiated by Dean, target branch feature/v1.14-quickwins off main (coordinator-owned git; working tree currently on feat/icon-sets). Four small, low-risk, ADDITIVE items: (1) random 'feeling lucky' sort + re-roll, (2) mobile logo = desktop brand mark, (3) per-folder hide-from-sidebar (distinct from hide-from-home), (4) default landing view Settings dropdown. RIGHT-SIZED process: light Discovery -> SDE -> build-verify (Node 22) -> single quality-assurance review -> Dean on-device pass (arbiter for visual items 1+2). No adversarial gate. Reset state from the completed v1.13 record to this v1.14 feature.

EM VERIFIED current code for all four items: (1) sort is client-side main.js:104-116 renderSorted() + localStorage['filetube_sort'] (:17/:207), dropdown index.html:104-111, server always newest (server.js:1784); (2) desktop .logo is a TEXT wordmark index.html:54 (CSS 284-301), mobile .mobile-logo is index.html:55-57 (CSS 1593/1709-1722), favicon.svg the only public/ brand asset; (3) hide-from-home = folderSettings[path].hidden, Setup toggle setup.html:267, applied server-side to home only (server.js:1748-1756), sidebar render main.js:84-101 shows all -- and POST /api/config whitelists folderSettings to {name,hidden}(+order) only (server.js:1532-1535) => new hiddenFromSidebar flag MUST be added there; (4) db.settings prefs via /api/settings with a KNOWN_KEYS allowlist that 400s unknown keys (server.js:1643) => new defaultView must be added end-to-end. Wrote the light Discovery inbox for product-manager at .state/inbox/product-manager.md (turn the 4 into concrete ACs). Surfaced three items for Dean: 2 genuine forks (item-1 re-roll button vs re-select -> recommend small shuffle button; item-4 folder path vs id -> recommend folder path/key) + 1 minor clarification (item-2 'desktop icon' is a text wordmark today -> confirm target asset). Set artifacts.requirements/exec_plan to docs/exec-plans/active/2026-07-06-v1.14-quickwins.md (PM to author). Routed to PM; awaiting PM output, then /prep-pe-design.
